seed_quotes: The secret of getting ahead is getting started. — Mark Twain
Focus is more about saying no than saying yes. — Steve Jobs
Amateurs sit and wait for inspiration. The rest of us just get up and go to work. — Stephen King
You don't have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great. — Zig Ziglar
The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
What we fear doing most is usually what we most need to do. — Tim Ferriss
Energy, not time, is the fundamental currency of high performance. — Jim Loehr
Deep work is the ability to focus without distraction on a cognitively demanding task. — Cal Newport
Your mind is for having ideas, not holding them. — David Allen
The successful warrior is the average man, with laser-like focus. — Bruce Lee

riddles.question: I speak without a mouth and hear without ears. I have no body, but I come alive with wind. What am I?
The more you take, the more you leave behind. What am I?
I have cities, but no houses live there. I have mountains, but no trees grow there. I have water, but no fish swim there. What am I?

facts: Your brain uses about 20% of your body's total energy, despite being only 2% of your body weight.
The average person has about 6,200 thoughts per day. Focus helps you direct them.
Studies show that it takes an average of 23 minutes to refocus after a distraction.
Walking for just 5 minutes can boost creative output by up to 60%.
The 'flow state' was first described by psychologist Mihaly Csikszentmihalyi in 1975.
